descriptions.english: Draw a damage spell and grant it +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower].
descriptions.french: Piochez un sort de dégâts, qui gagne +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower].
descriptions.german: Ziehe einen Schadenszauber und wende +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower] darauf an.
descriptions.russian: Вытяните чары урона. К ним добавится [magicpower] х[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage].
descriptions.portuguese: Compra um feitiço de dano e concede +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower] a ele.
descriptions.chinese: 抽一张伤害性法术牌并使其获得 +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][magicpower]。
descriptions.spanish: Roba un hechizo de daño y añade +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower].
descriptions.japanese: ダメージ呪文をドローして、+[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower]を付与する。
